hero.title: Find your fit in 4 quick taps.
hero.subtitle: No menus. No filters to fiddle with. Tell us who, what, the brand and the size — we'll show only items that match.

footer.tagline: Pre-loved branded thrift · Free message-to-buy on WhatsApp

audience.title: Who are you shopping for?
audience.subtitle: Pick one. We'll only show items that fit.

category.title: What type of item?
category.subtitle: Tap the kind of thing you're looking for.

brand.title: Any brand preference?
brand.subtitle: Tap one or many. Skip to see every brand we have.
brand.selectionHint: {count, plural, one {# brand selected} other {# brands selected}} · tap a chip to remove it
brand.noneSelectedHint: No brand picked? That's fine — we'll show every brand.

empty.title: No brands in this combo yet
empty.body: We don't have anything matching that combo right now. Skip to size and we'll keep an eye out — or tap back to try a different category.

size.title: Select your preferred size(s)
size.subtitle: You can pick more than one. Skip if you're not sure.
size.subtitleAccessories: Most accessories are one size — just tap continue.
size.skipHint: Not sure? Tap {cta} — we'll show every size.

shop.itemCount: {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}} in stock
shop.metadataDescription: Hand-picked {summary} from Balna's pre-loved collection. Buy via WhatsApp or bank transfer — every piece is one of one.
shop.metadataDescriptionFallback: Browse the full Balna pre-loved collection. Every piece is one of one — buy via WhatsApp or bank transfer.

empty.title: Nothing matches yet
empty.body: New arrivals drop every week. Try fewer filters, or message us on WhatsApp and we'll keep an eye out for you.

whatsapp.body: Tap below to open WhatsApp with a pre-filled message. We'll confirm availability and send you a payment link.

bank.unavailable: Bank transfer details aren't available right now. Please reach out on WhatsApp instead.

checkout.referenceFooter: Quote reference {ref} so we can match the transfer to this exact piece.

whatsapp.intro: Hi Balna! I'd like to buy:
